examples: The weather made it unfeasible to be outdoors.
Opening up new farmland was a possibility, but most of what was suitable had already been exploited and further reclamation was technically unfeasible.
Though possible in theory, the cost and effort of doing so makes this unfeasible in practice.
But it does mean that business as usual is increasingly unfeasible with each passing day.
Lanni insisted that there not be a mall, but having shopping outside in 110-degree heat was unfeasible.
